title: Run full optimization cycle on test score
description:
Execute complete optimization with real data to validate end-to-end functionality.

## Prerequisites

- Test score selected (from previous task)
- Smoke tests passing

## Test Execution

Run optimization with moderate settings:
```bash
plexus procedure optimize \
  -s <scorecard-key> \
  -c <score-key> \
  --days 90 \
  --max-iterations 3 \
  --improvement-threshold 0.02
```

## Validation Checklist

During execution, verify:
- [ ] Baseline evaluation runs with RCA
- [ ] RCA output shows meaningful topic clusters
- [ ] Analyzer agent proposes logical changes
- [ ] HITL approval gate appears with clear context
- [ ] After approval, new score version created
- [ ] Version note contains hypothesis
- [ ] Evaluation runs with baseline comparison
- [ ] Metric deltas calculated correctly
- [ ] Iteration log complete
- [ ] Can continue through multiple iterations

After completion, verify:
- [ ] Final summary shows total improvement
- [ ] All iterations logged correctly
- [ ] No data corruption (score versions valid)
- [ ] Baseline ID consistent across iterations

## Success Criteria

- Completes without errors
- At least 1 iteration executes fully
- Metrics improve or stay flat (no major regressions)
- All data structures match specifications

## Documentation

Comment with:
- Procedure ID
- Number of iterations completed
- AC1 improvement (baseline → final)
- Any issues encountered
- Screenshots of HITL prompts (if helpful)

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Running Full Optimization Test

**Target Score:**
- Scorecard: AW Confirmation (ID: 731)
- Score: Transfer Call? (ID: 47086)

**Parameters:**
- Days: 180 (last 6 months of feedback)
- Max samples: 100 per evaluation
- Max iterations: 3
- Dry run: No (will make real changes)

Starting optimization now...
